parts.text: {"answer":"src/cache/index.ts scopes TTL by namespace so one noisy namespace cannot extend or evict unrelated namespaces through a shared global TTL policy.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e1a1052affee43czVCqtDkLgE","blob_id":"cache_namespace_ttl","message_id":"msg_e1e5efae7001btighXYKrC0YuA"},"rationale":"The cited message explicitly says a global TTL was considered, but namespace-scoped TTL was chosen to isolate namespaces from each other's TTL effects. This rejected global-TTL alternative matters because it explains why the implementation avoids one shared TTL.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["Billing cache global TTL","Image cache namespace notes"]}
